title: Floral Fluffy Filipino Chicken Noodles
description: A halal-friendly, energizing Filipino dish featuring steamed chicken, fluffy noodles, and the salty taste of Parmigiano-Reggiano, infused with floral notes of pandan and lemongrass.
instructions: In a large pot, steam the chicken breast with pandan leaves and lemongrass until cooked through.
In a separate pot, boil the noodles according to package instructions until fluffy and slightly tender.
In a pan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat and sauté the steamed chicken until lightly browned.
Add the grated Parmigiano-Reggiano to the pan and stir until melted and well combined with the chicken.
Combine the cooked noodles, chicken mixture, and chicken broth in a large serving bowl.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with additional pandan leaves and lemongrass stalks, if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
Reheat the dish by steaming or microwaving until hot and fluffy.
